productDisplayName: Puma Women Maya Shimmer Blue Shoes
description: Stylish shoes for women from puma. Superior quality meets a fashion innovation with these shoes from the high-on-style, German, sportswear brand. Upper Synthetic upper with perforations and leather and suede overlays Padded tongue and collar Central lace up Jumping cat logo printed at the back of the collar Brand name appliqued on the tongue and midfoot Outsole Upraised heel with circular lugs Circular suction points on the forefoot and midfoot area shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
